name: Williams Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast garlic cloves (peeled and washed) in a 350°F oven until soft and brown.
2. Chop garlic with a fork.
3. Add everything except the half and half to a saucepan.
4. Cook over low heat until all cheese has melted but not until it starts getting greasy.
5. Gradually add the half and half, cooking until thick (add flour slowly if needed, as this sauce tends to thicken itself well).
6. Chill overnight.
7. Reheat and serve.
